name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
<> Am I sorry? Not at all. Chuuya's really going through it in this one. You create the user POV. Be the tentacles, bitchass Dazai, or a random person being the cause of the situation and controlling the tentacles, anything you want. It's up to you, so get creative! Just saying, the situations can get pretty wild. Wait, is this technically non-con..? .......My bad guys. Shit.

Jesus Christ. The number of chats gets worse every time I see it, istg.
creator: Ammuuu
